CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.add_items_to_order(p_order_id bigint, p_items jsonb)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO public.order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, quantity, unit_price)
    SELECT
        p_order_id,
        (item.product_id)::BIGINT,
        item.product_name,
        (item.quantity)::NUMERIC,
        (item.unit_price)::NUMERIC
    FROM jsonb_to_recordset(p_items) AS item(
        product_id TEXT,
        product_name TEXT,
        quantity TEXT,
        unit_price TEXT
    );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.add_to_ingredient_stock(p_ingredient_id bigint, p_quantity_to_add numeric)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    UPDATE public.ingredients
    SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity + p_quantity_to_add
    WHERE id = p_ingredient_id;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.close_table_session(p_session_id uuid)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    UPDATE public.table_sessions
    SET closed_at = NOW()
    WHERE id = p_session_id AND restaurant_id = get_my_restaurant_id();
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.create_manual_order(p_customer_phone text, p_customer_name text, p_payment_method text, p_total numeric, p_notes text, p_items order_item_data[], p_cep text, p_street text, p_number text, p_neighborhood text, p_city text, p_state text, p_complement text)
 RETURNS bigint
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_customer_id bigint;
    v_order_id bigint;
    item public.order_item_data;
    v_restaurant_id uuid := public.get_my_restaurant_id();
BEGIN
    -- 1. Tenta encontrar o cliente pelo telefone. Se não existir, cria um novo (UPSERT).
    --    Agora também atualiza todos os campos de endereço.
    INSERT INTO public.customers (restaurant_id, phone, name, cep, street, "number", neighborhood, city, state, complement)
    VALUES (v_restaurant_id, p_customer_phone, p_customer_name, p_cep, p_street, p_number, p_neighborhood, p_city, p_state, p_complement)
    ON CONFLICT (restaurant_id, phone)
    DO UPDATE SET
        name = EXCLUDED.name,
        cep = EXCLUDED.cep,
        street = EXCLUDED.street,
        "number" = EXCLUDED.number,
        neighborhood = EXCLUDED.neighborhood,
        city = EXCLUDED.city,
        state = EXCLUDED.state,
        complement = EXCLUDED.complement
    RETURNING id INTO v_customer_id;

    -- 2. Insere o novo pedido
    INSERT INTO public.orders (restaurant_id, customer_id, source, total, payment_method, notes)
    VALUES (v_restaurant_id, v_customer_id, 'manual', p_total, p_payment_method, p_notes)
    RETURNING id INTO v_order_id;

    -- 3. Insere os itens do pedido
    FOREACH item IN ARRAY p_items
    LOOP
        INSERT INTO public.order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, quantity, unit_price)
        VALUES (v_order_id, item.product_id, item.product_name, item.quantity, item.unit_price);
    END LOOP;

    -- 4. Retorna o ID do pedido que foi criado
    RETURN v_order_id;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.decrement_stock()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    order_item RECORD;
    product_info RECORD;
    prod_ingredient RECORD;
BEGIN
    -- Itera sobre cada item do pedido que foi inserido
    FOR order_item IN SELECT * FROM new_order_items LOOP
        -- Busca as informações de controle de estoque do produto vendido
        SELECT stock_control_enabled, stock_control_type 
        INTO product_info
        FROM public.products
        WHERE id = order_item.product_id;

        -- Se o controle de estoque estiver ativo
        IF product_info.stock_control_enabled THEN
            -- Se o controle for por unidade do produto
            IF product_info.stock_control_type = 'product' THEN
                UPDATE public.products
                SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity - order_item.quantity
                WHERE id = order_item.product_id;
            
            -- Se o controle for por ingredientes
            ELSIF product_info.stock_control_type = 'ingredient' THEN
                -- Itera sobre cada ingrediente que compõe o produto
                FOR prod_ingredient IN 
                    SELECT ingredient_id, quantity_used 
                    FROM public.product_ingredients
                    WHERE product_id = order_item.product_id
                LOOP
                    -- Decrementa o estoque do ingrediente
                    UPDATE public.ingredients
                    SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity - (prod_ingredient.quantity_used * order_item.quantity)
                    WHERE id = prod_ingredient.ingredient_id;
                END LOOP;
            END IF;
        END IF;
    END LOOP;
    RETURN NULL;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.finalize_whatsapp_order(p_customer_phone text, p_restaurant_id_param uuid, p_order_data jsonb)
 RETURNS bigint
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_customer_id BIGINT;
    v_order_id BIGINT;
    v_order_total NUMERIC := 0;
    v_product RECORD;
    item JSONB;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Encontrar o cliente. Se não existir, criar um novo.
    INSERT INTO public.customers (restaurant_id, phone, name, street, "number", neighborhood, city, state, complement)
    VALUES (
        p_restaurant_id_param,
        p_customer_phone,
        p_order_data->>'customer_name',
        p_order_data->'address'->>'street',
        p_order_data->'address'->>'number',
        p_order_data->'address'->>'neighborhood',
        p_order_data->'address'->>'city',
        p_order_data->'address'->>'state',
        p_order_data->'address'->>'complement'
    )
    ON CONFLICT (restaurant_id, phone)
    DO UPDATE SET
        name = EXCLUDED.name,
        street = EXCLUDED.street,
        "number" = EXCLUDED.number,
        neighborhood = EXCLUDED.neighborhood,
        city = EXCLUDED.city,
        state = EXCLUDED.state,
        complement = EXCLUDED.complement
    RETURNING id INTO v_customer_id;

    -- 2. Encontrar o 'pre-pedido' mais recente para este cliente.
    SELECT id INTO v_order_id
    FROM public.orders
    WHERE customer_id = v_customer_id AND status = 'pre-pedido'
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1;
    
    -- Se não houver pré-pedido, cria um novo
    IF v_order_id IS NULL THEN
        INSERT INTO public.orders (restaurant_id, customer_id, source, status)
        VALUES (p_restaurant_id_param, v_customer_id, 'whatsapp', 'pre-pedido')
        RETURNING id INTO v_order_id;
    END IF;

    -- 3. Inserir os itens e calcular o total
    FOR item IN SELECT * FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_order_data->'items')
    LOOP
        -- Tenta encontrar o produto pelo nome (pode precisar de ajuste fino)
        SELECT id, price INTO v_product
        FROM public.products
        WHERE restaurant_id = p_restaurant_id_param
          AND lower(name) = lower(item->>'product_name')
        LIMIT 1;

        IF v_product IS NOT NULL THEN
            INSERT INTO public.order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, quantity, unit_price)
            VALUES (v_order_id, v_product.id, item->>'product_name', (item->>'quantity')::NUMERIC, v_product.price);

            v_order_total := v_order_total + ((item->>'quantity')::NUMERIC * v_product.price);
        END IF;
    END LOOP;

    -- 4. Atualizar o pedido para 'pendente' com os dados finais
    UPDATE public.orders
    SET
        status = 'pendente',
        total = v_order_total,
        payment_method = p_order_data->>'payment_method',
        notes = p_order_data->>'notes',
        created_at = NOW() -- Define o tempo de criação para o momento da finalização
    WHERE id = v_order_id;
    
    RETURN v_order_id;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_client_evolution_chart(start_date timestamp with time zone, end_date timestamp with time zone, grouping_unit text)
 RETURNS TABLE(series_date date, new_customers bigint, recurrent_customers bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
    WITH daily_customers AS (
        SELECT
            o.created_at::date as order_date,
            o.customer_id,
            -- Verifica se a data da primeira compra do cliente é a mesma da compra atual
            (MIN(c.created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY o.customer_id))::date = o.created_at::date AS is_new
        FROM public.orders o
        JOIN public.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
        WHERE o.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id()
          AND o.status <> 'pre-pedido'
          AND o.created_at BETWEEN start_date AND end_date
    )
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC(grouping_unit, dc.order_date)::date AS series_date,
        -- Conta clientes distintos que são marcados como 'novos'
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN dc.is_new THEN dc.customer_id END) AS new_customers,
        -- Conta clientes distintos que NÃO são marcados como 'novos'
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NOT dc.is_new THEN dc.customer_id END) AS recurrent_customers
    FROM daily_customers dc
    GROUP BY series_date
    ORDER BY series_date;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_customer_analytics()
 RETURNS TABLE(id bigint, name text, phone text, order_count bigint, last_order_date timestamp with time zone, average_ticket numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT
        c.id,
        c.name,
        c.phone,
        COUNT(o.id) as order_count,
        MAX(o.created_at) as last_order_date,
        AVG(o.total) as average_ticket
    FROM
        public.customers c
    LEFT JOIN
        public.orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
    WHERE
        c.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id()
        -- AND o.status <> 'pre-pedido' -- Adicionado para não contar carrinhos abandonados
    GROUP BY
        c.id
    ORDER BY
        AVG(o.total) DESC NULLS LAST, c.name;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_customer_export()
 RETURNS TABLE(name text, phone text, total_orders bigint, average_ticket numeric, first_order_date timestamp with time zone, last_order_date timestamp with time zone, is_potential_churn boolean, is_churn boolean)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
    WITH customer_stats AS (
        SELECT
            c.id,
            c.name,
            c.phone,
            COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders,
            COALESCE(AVG(o.total), 0) AS average_ticket,
            MIN(o.created_at) AS first_order_date,
            MAX(o.created_at) AS last_order_date,
            CASE
                WHEN COUNT(o.id) > 1 THEN
                    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.created_at) - MIN(o.created_at))) / 86400.0 / (COUNT(o.id) - 1)
                ELSE 30 -- Assume um intervalo padrão de 30 dias para clientes de um só pedido
            END AS avg_days_between_orders
        FROM public.customers c
        LEFT JOIN public.orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
        WHERE c.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id() AND o.status <> 'pre-pedido'
        GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.phone
    )
    SELECT
        s.name,
        s.phone,
        s.total_orders,
        s.average_ticket,
        s.first_order_date,
        s.last_order_date,
        -- Risco de Churn: passou do intervalo médio + 15 dias
        (NOW() - s.last_order_date) > (s.avg_days_between_orders + 15) * INTERVAL '1 day' AS is_potential_churn,
        -- Churn: passou do intervalo médio + 30 dias
        (NOW() - s.last_order_date) > (s.avg_days_between_orders + 30) * INTERVAL '1 day' AS is_churn
    FROM customer_stats s
    ORDER BY s.last_order_date DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_dashboard_analytics(start_date timestamp with time zone, end_date timestamp with time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(total_revenue numeric, total_orders bigint, average_ticket numeric, new_customers bigint, abandoned_carts bigint, average_recurrence numeric, global_avg_days_between_orders numeric, potential_churn_customers bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    -- CTE para calcular estatísticas gerais de todos os clientes (para churn e recorrência)
    WITH all_customer_stats AS (
        SELECT
            c.id AS customer_id,
            MAX(o.created_at) AS last_order_date,
            COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders,
            CASE
                WHEN COUNT(o.id) > 1 THEN
                    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(o.created_at) - MIN(o.created_at))) / 86400.0 / (COUNT(o.id) - 1)
                ELSE 0
            END AS avg_days_between_orders
        FROM
            public.customers c
        JOIN
            public.orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
        WHERE
            c.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id() AND o.status <> 'pre-pedido'
        GROUP BY
            c.id
    )
    -- A consulta principal que usa as datas e as estatísticas gerais
    SELECT
        -- Métricas de Faturamento e Pedidos DENTRO do período
        COALESCE(SUM(o.total), 0)::numeric AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.id)::bigint AS total_orders,
        COALESCE(AVG(o.total), 0)::numeric AS average_ticket,
        
        -- Novos Clientes: conta clientes cuja data de criação foi DENTRO do período
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) 
         FROM public.customers c 
         WHERE c.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id() AND c.created_at BETWEEN start_date AND end_date)::bigint AS new_customers,

        -- Carrinhos Abandonados DENTRO do período
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.orders ord 
         WHERE ord.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id() AND ord.status = 'pre-pedido' 
         AND ord.created_at BETWEEN start_date AND end_date)::bigint AS abandoned_carts,

        -- Métricas de Recorrência e Churn (usam dados de todos os tempos)
        (SELECT COALESCE(AVG(s.total_orders), 0) FROM all_customer_stats s)::numeric AS average_recurrence,
        (SELECT COALESCE(AVG(s.avg_days_between_orders), 0) FROM all_customer_stats s)::numeric AS global_avg_days_between_orders,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM all_customer_stats s 
         WHERE (NOW() - s.last_order_date) > (s.avg_days_between_orders + 15) * INTERVAL '1 day')::bigint AS potential_churn_customers

    FROM
        public.orders o
    WHERE
        o.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id()
        AND o.status <> 'pre-pedido'
        AND o.created_at BETWEEN start_date AND end_date;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_dashboard_kpis(start_date timestamp with time zone, end_date timestamp with time zone)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    metrics_data jsonb;
    -- Calcula a duração do período para encontrar o período anterior
    period_duration interval := end_date - start_date;
    previous_start_date timestamptz := start_date - period_duration - interval '1 day';
    previous_end_date timestamptz := end_date - period_duration - interval '1 day';
BEGIN
    -- Função interna para calcular métricas para um dado período
    CREATE TEMP TABLE results AS
    SELECT 
        -- Primeiro, busca os dados históricos já calculados
        (SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'total_revenue', COALESCE(SUM(total_revenue), 0),
            'total_orders', COALESCE(SUM(total_orders), 0),
            'average_ticket', COALESCE(AVG(average_ticket), 0),
            'new_customers', COALESCE(SUM(new_customers), 0),
            'abandoned_carts', COALESCE(SUM(abandoned_carts), 0)
        ) FROM public.daily_restaurant_metrics
        WHERE restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id() AND metric_date BETWEEN start_date::date AND end_date::date) AS historical,

        -- Depois, calcula os dados de "Hoje" em tempo real
        (SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'total_revenue', COALESCE(SUM(total), 0),
            'total_orders', COUNT(id),
            'average_ticket', COALESCE(AVG(total), 0),
            'new_customers', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.customers WHERE restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id() AND created_at::date = NOW()::date),
            'abandoned_carts', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.orders WHERE restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id() AND status = 'pre-pedido' AND created_at::date = NOW()::date)
        ) FROM public.orders
        WHERE restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id() AND status <> 'pre-pedido' AND created_at::date = NOW()::date) AS today_realtime;

    -- Combina os resultados
    SELECT jsonb_build_object(
        'current_period', (SELECT historical FROM results) || (SELECT today_realtime FROM results)
        -- A lógica para o período anterior pode ser adicionada aqui de forma similar
    ) INTO metrics_data;

    -- Limpa a tabela temporária
    DROP TABLE results;

    RETURN metrics_data;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_dashboard_timeseries_chart(start_date timestamp with time zone, end_date timestamp with time zone, grouping_unit text)
 RETURNS TABLE(series_date date, total_revenue numeric, total_orders bigint, average_ticket numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC(grouping_unit, o.created_at)::date AS series_date,
        COALESCE(SUM(o.total), 0) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders,
        COALESCE(AVG(o.total), 0) AS average_ticket
    FROM public.orders o
    WHERE o.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id()
      AND o.status <> 'pre-pedido'
      AND o.created_at BETWEEN start_date AND end_date
    GROUP BY series_date
    ORDER BY series_date;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_location_performance_chart(start_date timestamp with time zone, end_date timestamp with time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(neighborhood text, order_count bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
    SELECT
        c.neighborhood,
        COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
    FROM public.orders o
    JOIN public.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
    WHERE o.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id()
      AND o.status <> 'pre-pedido'
      AND c.neighborhood IS NOT NULL
      AND o.created_at BETWEEN start_date AND end_date
    GROUP BY c.neighborhood
    ORDER BY order_count DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_my_profile()
 RETURNS TABLE(full_name text, role text, restaurant_id uuid, restaurant_name text, configs jsonb)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT
        p.full_name,
        p.role,
        p.restaurant_id,
        r.name,
        r.configs
    FROM
        public.profiles p
    JOIN
        public.restaurants r ON p.restaurant_id = r.id
    WHERE
        p.id = auth.uid();
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_my_restaurant_id()
 RETURNS uuid
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
  SELECT restaurant_id
  FROM public.profiles
  WHERE id = auth.uid();
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_my_role()
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  SELECT NULLIF(current_setting('request.jwt.claims', true)::jsonb->>'role', '')::TEXT;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_product_performance_chart(start_date timestamp with time zone, end_date timestamp with time zone)
 RETURNS TABLE(product_name text, category_name text, total_quantity numeric, total_revenue numeric)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
    SELECT
        oi.product_name,
        c.name AS category_name,
        SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_revenue
    FROM public.order_items oi
    JOIN public.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
    LEFT JOIN public.products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN public.categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
    WHERE o.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id()
      AND o.status <> 'pre-pedido'
      AND o.created_at BETWEEN start_date AND end_date
    GROUP BY oi.product_name, c.name
    ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_restaurant_users()
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, full_name text, email text, role text)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- Esta função só pode ser chamada por usuários autenticados.
    IF auth.uid() IS NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Acesso negado: Usuário não autenticado.';
    END IF;

    -- Retorna os perfis e e-mails dos usuários que pertencem
    -- ao mesmo restaurante que o usuário que está fazendo a chamada.
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT
        p.id,
        p.full_name,
        u.email::text, -- CORREÇÃO: Converte o tipo da coluna email
        p.role
    FROM
        public.profiles p
    JOIN
        auth.users u ON p.id = u.id
    WHERE
        p.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id();
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_tables_with_totals()
 RETURNS TABLE(id bigint, number integer, status text, session_id uuid, total_amount numeric, start_time timestamp with time zone)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT
        t.id,
        t.number,
        CASE
            WHEN ts.id IS NOT NULL AND ts.closed_at IS NULL THEN 'ocupada'::text
            ELSE 'livre'::text
        END AS status,
        ts.id AS session_id,
        COALESCE(ts.total_amount, 0) AS total_amount,
        ts.created_at AS start_time
    FROM
        public.tables t
    LEFT JOIN
        public.table_sessions ts ON t.id = ts.table_id AND ts.closed_at IS NULL
    WHERE
        t.restaurant_id = get_my_restaurant_id()
    ORDER BY
        t.number;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  -- Insere o novo perfil, puxando TODOS os dados dos metadados do usuário
  insert into public.profiles (id, full_name, role, restaurant_id)
  values (
    new.id,
    new.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name',
    new.raw_user_meta_data->>'role', -- Corrigido para ler de user_meta_data
    (new.raw_user_meta_data->>'restaurant_id')::uuid -- Corrigido para ler de user_meta_data
  );
  return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_restaurant_open(p_restaurant_id uuid)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_is_manually_set_open BOOLEAN;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Busca o valor do interruptor manual 'is_open' nas configurações do restaurante.
    SELECT (configs->>'is_open')::BOOLEAN INTO v_is_manually_set_open
    FROM public.restaurants
    WHERE id = p_restaurant_id;

    -- 2. Se o interruptor não existir (nulo) ou estiver definido como 'false', o restaurante está fechado.
    --    A função COALESCE trata o caso de 'is_open' nunca ter sido definido, assumindo 'false' como padrão.
    RETURN COALESCE(v_is_manually_set_open, FALSE);
    
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.search_customer_by_phone(p_phone text)
 RETURNS TABLE(name text, last_address text)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT c.name, c.last_address
    FROM public.customers c
    WHERE c.phone = p_phone
      AND c.restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id()
    LIMIT 1;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.submit_final_order(p_order_id bigint, p_customer_id bigint, p_customer_name text, p_payment_method text, p_notes text, p_final_items jsonb, p_cep text, p_street text, p_number text, p_neighborhood text, p_city text, p_state text, p_complement text, p_coupon_code text, p_discount_amount numeric, p_order_type text, p_delivery_fee numeric)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_subtotal NUMERIC;
    v_final_total NUMERIC;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Apaga os itens temporários do pré-pedido
    DELETE FROM public.order_items WHERE order_id = p_order_id;

    -- 2. Insere os novos itens já consolidados
    INSERT INTO public.order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, quantity, unit_price)
    SELECT
        p_order_id,
        (item->>'product_id')::BIGINT,
        item->>'product_name',
        (item->>'quantity')::NUMERIC,
        (item->>'unit_price')::NUMERIC
    FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_final_items) AS item;

    -- 3. Recalcula o subtotal dos itens
    SELECT SUM(quantity * unit_price) INTO v_subtotal
    FROM public.order_items
    WHERE order_id = p_order_id;
    
    v_subtotal := COALESCE(v_subtotal, 0);

    -- 4. Calcula o total final (subtotal + entrega dinâmica - desconto)
    v_final_total := v_subtotal + COALESCE(p_delivery_fee, 0) - COALESCE(p_discount_amount, 0);

    -- 5. Atualiza o pedido para "pendente" com os dados finais
    UPDATE public.orders
    SET
        status = 'pendente',
        total = v_final_total, -- Total final com taxa e desconto aplicados
        payment_method = p_payment_method,
        notes = p_notes,
        created_at = now(),
        discount_amount = p_discount_amount,
        coupon_code = p_coupon_code,
        order_type = p_order_type,
        delivery_fee = p_delivery_fee -- Salva a taxa de entrega no pedido
    WHERE id = p_order_id;

    -- 6. Atualiza os dados do cliente
    UPDATE public.customers
    SET
        name = p_customer_name,
        cep = p_cep,
        street = p_street,
        "number" = p_number,
        neighborhood = p_neighborhood,
        city = p_city,
        state = p_state,
        complement = p_complement
    WHERE id = p_customer_id;

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.submit_final_order(p_order_id bigint, p_customer_id bigint, p_customer_name text, p_payment_method text, p_notes text, p_final_items jsonb, p_cep text, p_street text, p_number text, p_neighborhood text, p_city text, p_state text, p_complement text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_order_total NUMERIC;
    v_delivery_fee NUMERIC;
BEGIN
    -- 1. Apaga os itens temporários do pré-pedido
    DELETE FROM public.order_items WHERE order_id = p_order_id;

    -- 2. Insere os novos itens já consolidados
    INSERT INTO public.order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, quantity, unit_price)
    SELECT
        p_order_id,
        (item->>'product_id')::BIGINT,
        item->>'product_name',
        (item->>'quantity')::NUMERIC,
        (item->>'unit_price')::NUMERIC
    FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_final_items) AS item;

    -- 3. Recalcula o total final
    SELECT SUM(quantity * unit_price) INTO v_order_total
    FROM public.order_items
    WHERE order_id = p_order_id;

    -- 4. Busca e adiciona a taxa de entrega, se houver
    SELECT (configs->>'deliveryFee')::NUMERIC INTO v_delivery_fee
    FROM public.restaurants r
    JOIN public.orders o ON r.id = o.restaurant_id
    WHERE o.id = p_order_id;
    
    v_order_total := v_order_total + COALESCE(v_delivery_fee, 0);

    -- 5. Atualiza o pedido para "pendente" com os dados finais
    UPDATE public.orders
    SET
        status = 'pendente',
        total = v_order_total,
        payment_method = p_payment_method,
        notes = p_notes,
        created_at = now()
    WHERE id = p_order_id;

    -- 6. ATUALIZAÇÃO CORRIGIDA: Salva todos os campos de endereço na tabela 'customers'
    UPDATE public.customers
    SET
        name = p_customer_name,
        cep = p_cep,
        street = p_street,
        "number" = p_number,
        neighborhood = p_neighborhood,
        city = p_city,
        state = p_state,
        complement = p_complement
    WHERE id = p_customer_id;

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.submit_final_order(p_order_id bigint, p_customer_id bigint, p_customer_name text, p_payment_method text, p_notes text, p_final_items jsonb, p_cep text, p_street text, p_number text, p_neighborhood text, p_city text, p_state text, p_complement text, p_coupon_code text, p_discount_amount numeric, p_order_type text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_subtotal NUMERIC;
    v_delivery_fee NUMERIC;
    v_final_total NUMERIC;
    v_restaurant_id UUID;
BEGIN
    -- Descobre o ID do restaurante a partir do pedido
    SELECT restaurant_id INTO v_restaurant_id FROM public.orders WHERE id = p_order_id;
    
    -- 1. Apaga os itens temporários do pré-pedido
    DELETE FROM public.order_items WHERE order_id = p_order_id;

    -- 2. Insere os novos itens já consolidados
    INSERT INTO public.order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, quantity, unit_price)
    SELECT
        p_order_id,
        (item->>'product_id')::BIGINT,
        item->>'product_name',
        (item->>'quantity')::NUMERIC,
        (item->>'unit_price')::NUMERIC
    FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_final_items) AS item;

    -- 3. Recalcula o subtotal dos itens
    SELECT SUM(quantity * unit_price) INTO v_subtotal
    FROM public.order_items
    WHERE order_id = p_order_id;
    
    v_subtotal := COALESCE(v_subtotal, 0);

    -- 4. Busca a taxa de entrega (só aplica se for 'delivery')
    IF p_order_type = 'delivery' THEN
        SELECT (configs->>'deliveryFee')::NUMERIC INTO v_delivery_fee
        FROM public.restaurants WHERE id = v_restaurant_id;
    ELSE
        v_delivery_fee := 0;
    END IF;
    
    v_delivery_fee := COALESCE(v_delivery_fee, 0);

    -- 5. Calcula o total final (subtotal + entrega - desconto)
    v_final_total := v_subtotal + v_delivery_fee - COALESCE(p_discount_amount, 0);

    -- 6. Atualiza o pedido para "pendente" com os dados finais
    UPDATE public.orders
    SET
        status = 'pendente',
        total = v_final_total,
        payment_method = p_payment_method,
        notes = p_notes,
        created_at = now(),
        discount_amount = p_discount_amount,
        coupon_code = p_coupon_code,
        order_type = p_order_type, -- SALVA O TIPO DE PEDIDO
        source = 'cardapio_digital' -- Garante a origem correta
    WHERE id = p_order_id;

    -- 7. Atualiza os dados do cliente
    UPDATE public.customers
    SET
        name = p_customer_name,
        cep = p_cep,
        street = p_street,
        "number" = p_number,
        neighborhood = p_neighborhood,
        city = p_city,
        state = p_state,
        complement = p_complement
    WHERE id = p_customer_id;

    -- 8. INCREMENTA O USO DO CUPOM
    IF p_coupon_code IS NOT NULL THEN
        UPDATE public.promotions
        SET uses_count = uses_count + 1
        WHERE coupon_code = p_coupon_code
          AND restaurant_id = v_restaurant_id;
    END IF;

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.submit_order(p_order_id bigint, p_customer_id bigint, p_customer_name text, p_customer_address text, p_payment_method text, p_notes text, p_total numeric)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- Atualiza os dados do cliente (nome e último endereço)
    UPDATE public.customers
    SET name = p_customer_name, last_address = p_customer_address
    WHERE id = p_customer_id;

    -- Atualiza o pedido de 'pre-pedido' para 'pendente' com todos os detalhes finais
    UPDATE public.orders
    SET
        status = 'pendente',
        payment_method = p_payment_method,
        notes = p_notes,
        total = p_total,
        created_at = now() -- Define a hora de criação para o momento da submissão
    WHERE id = p_order_id;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.update_availability_for_products_using_ingredient(p_ingredient_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    prod RECORD;
    is_product_available BOOLEAN;
BEGIN
    -- Encontra todos os produtos que usam o ingrediente modificado
    FOR prod IN 
        SELECT p.id
        FROM public.products p
        JOIN public.product_ingredients pi ON p.id = pi.product_id
        WHERE pi.ingredient_id = p_ingredient_id AND p.stock_control_type = 'ingredient'
    LOOP
        -- Para cada produto, verifica se TODOS os seus ingredientes estão em estoque
        SELECT NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM public.product_ingredients pi
            JOIN public.ingredients i ON pi.ingredient_id = i.id
            WHERE pi.product_id = prod.id AND i.stock_quantity < pi.quantity_used
        )
        INTO is_product_available;

        -- Atualiza a disponibilidade do produto
        UPDATE public.products
        SET is_available = is_product_available
        WHERE id = prod.id;
    END LOOP;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.update_daily_metrics()
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    yesterday_date date := (NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')::date;
    r record;
BEGIN
    -- Itera sobre cada restaurante no sistema
    FOR r IN SELECT id FROM public.restaurants
    LOOP
        -- Insere ou atualiza as métricas do dia anterior para o restaurante atual
        INSERT INTO public.daily_restaurant_metrics (
            restaurant_id,
            metric_date,
            total_revenue,
            total_orders,
            average_ticket,
            new_customers,
            abandoned_carts
        )
        SELECT
            r.id,
            yesterday_date,
            COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.status <> 'pre-pedido' THEN o.total ELSE 0 END), 0),
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status <> 'pre-pedido' THEN o.id END),
            COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN o.status <> 'pre-pedido' THEN o.total END), 0),
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.created_at::date = yesterday_date THEN c.id END),
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'pre-pedido' THEN o.id END)
        FROM public.orders o
        LEFT JOIN public.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id AND c.restaurant_id = r.id
        WHERE o.restaurant_id = r.id
          AND o.created_at::date = yesterday_date
        ON CONFLICT (restaurant_id, metric_date)
        DO UPDATE SET
            total_revenue = EXCLUDED.total_revenue,
            total_orders = EXCLUDED.total_orders,
            average_ticket = EXCLUDED.average_ticket,
            new_customers = EXCLUDED.new_customers,
            abandoned_carts = EXCLUDED.abandoned_carts;
    END LOOP;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.update_product_popularity()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    UPDATE products 
    SET popularity = popularity + NEW.quantity
    WHERE id = NEW.product_id;
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.upsert_category(p_category_id bigint, p_category_name text)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    IF p_category_id IS NOT NULL THEN
        -- Atualiza uma categoria existente
        UPDATE public.categories
        SET name = p_category_name
        WHERE id = p_category_id;
    ELSE
        -- Insere uma nova categoria, pegando o restaurant_id do usuário logado
        INSERT INTO public.categories (name, restaurant_id)
        VALUES (p_category_name, auth.uid()); -- ou a sua função get_my_restaurant_id()
    END IF;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.upsert_category(p_category_id bigint, p_category_name text, p_parent_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    IF p_category_id IS NULL THEN
        INSERT INTO public.categories (restaurant_id, name, parent_id)
        VALUES (public.get_my_restaurant_id(), p_category_name, p_parent_id);
    ELSE
        UPDATE public.categories
        SET name = p_category_name, parent_id = p_parent_id
        WHERE id = p_category_id AND restaurant_id = public.get_my_restaurant_id();
    END IF;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.upsert_product_with_ingredients(p_product_data jsonb, p_ingredients jsonb)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_product_id BIGINT;
    ingredient_item JSONB;
BEGIN
    -- Extrai o ID do payload. Pode ser nulo para novos produtos.
    v_product_id := (p_product_data->>'id')::BIGINT;

    -- Verifica se é uma inserção (id é nulo) ou uma atualização (id tem valor)
    IF v_product_id IS NULL THEN
        -- INSERE um novo produto (omitindo a coluna 'id' para o banco gerar)
        INSERT INTO public.products (name, description, price, category_id, is_available, half_iten, stock_control_enabled, stock_control_type, stock_quantity, image_url, restaurant_id)
        VALUES (
            p_product_data->>'name',
            p_product_data->>'description',
            (p_product_data->>'price')::NUMERIC,
            (p_product_data->>'category_id')::BIGINT,
            (p_product_data->>'is_available')::BOOLEAN,
            (p_product_data->>'half_iten')::BOOLEAN,
            (p_product_data->>'stock_control_enabled')::BOOLEAN,
            p_product_data->>'stock_control_type',
            (p_product_data->>'stock_quantity')::INTEGER,
            p_product_data->>'image_url',
            get_my_restaurant_id()
        ) RETURNING id INTO v_product_id;
    ELSE
        -- ATUALIZA um produto existente
        UPDATE public.products SET
            name = p_product_data->>'name',
            description = p_product_data->>'description',
            price = (p_product_data->>'price')::NUMERIC,
            category_id = (p_product_data->>'category_id')::BIGINT,
            is_available = (p_product_data->>'is_available')::BOOLEAN,
            half_iten = (p_product_data->>'half_iten')::BOOLEAN,
            stock_control_enabled = (p_product_data->>'stock_control_enabled')::BOOLEAN,
            stock_control_type = p_product_data->>'stock_control_type',
            stock_quantity = (p_product_data->>'stock_quantity')::INTEGER,
            image_url = COALESCE(p_product_data->>'image_url', products.image_url)
        WHERE id = v_product_id;
    END IF;

    -- Gerencia os ingredientes usando o ID do produto (novo ou existente)
    IF p_product_data->>'stock_control_type' = 'ingredient' THEN
        DELETE FROM public.product_ingredients WHERE product_id = v_product_id;

        IF jsonb_array_length(p_ingredients) > 0 THEN
            FOR ingredient_item IN SELECT * FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_ingredients)
            LOOP
                INSERT INTO public.product_ingredients (product_id, ingredient_id, quantity_used)
                VALUES (v_product_id, (ingredient_item->>'ingredient_id')::BIGINT, (ingredient_item->>'quantity_used')::NUMERIC);
            END LOOP;
        END IF;
    END IF;

END;
$function$
